message:
fix(onboard): Use degraded cass search and improve TTY detection

- Switch from cassSearch to safeCassSearchWithDegraded for session sampling
  This ensures onboarding works gracefully when cass is unavailable
- Improve --reset confirmation logic:
  - Better TTY detection (check both stdin and stdout)
  - Return proper JSON error when --yes not provided in non-TTY mode
  - Clear error messaging for automation contexts

Test updates:
- Adjust test helpers for updated behavior
- Update e2e tests for new confirmation patterns

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
